call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently filled out a form online regarding a Personal Loan. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. I'm alright. 
Agent: Great! So, based on the information you provided, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: Well, I was mostly looking at consolidating some credit card debt. It's just… getting a little out of hand. 
Agent: Absolutely, that's a very common reason people take out these loans. And with 8.99%, you'd likely save a significant amount in interest. We can tailor the repayment schedule to fit your budget. Like, we can go with 36, 48, even 60 months. 
Eleanor: Hmm, 60 months sounds good. What would the monthly payments be roughly? 
Agent: Let me calculate that for you… Okay, with a $10,000 loan at 8.99% over 60 months, your estimated monthly payment would be around $204. 
Eleanor: That… that actually sounds pretty manageable. What are the fees associated with the loan? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150. And, uh, standard late payment fees if applicable. But honestly, we try to work with our customers to avoid those. 
Eleanor: Okay. And there's no prepayment penalty, right? 
Agent: No, absolutely not. You can pay it off early without any penalty whatsoever. So, are you interested in proceeding with the application? We can get it started right now. 
Eleanor: Yeah, okay. Let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a low introductory rate. We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 19.99% for the first six months. 
Robert: 19.99%? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. I don't need another one. And frankly, I'm not happy about being called out of the blue. 
Agent: But sir, this card has excellent rewards… 
Robert: (Interrupting) I said I'm not interested! Don't call me again! (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan. I understand you were referred by our partner, GreenTech Solutions? 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, hi! Mark from GreenTech mentioned you guys. I'm looking to finance some new equipment for my business. 
Agent: Excellent! We specialize in loans for entrepreneurs. Based on your profile, we are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. That's a really competitive rate, especially for self-employed individuals. 
Jessica: That sounds pretty good. What's the catch? 
Agent: No catch! Just standard loan terms. We offer flexible repayment options, from 24 to 72 months. What kind of equipment are you looking to purchase? 
Jessica: It's a new 3D printer. It's pretty expensive, and I want to spread the payments out. 
Agent: A 3D printer, fantastic! That's a growing market. Let's look at a 60-month repayment plan. Your estimated monthly payment would be around $290. 
Jessica: Okay, that's within my budget. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $200 origination fee, and standard late payment fees if applicable. We also offer a discount on the origination fee if you sign up for automatic payments. 
Jessica: Automatic payments sound good. So, $200 origination fee, and then $290 a month for 60 months? 
Agent: Exactly. And remember, that's at a fixed rate of 7.49%. We can send you a detailed loan agreement outlining all the terms and conditions. 
Jessica: Yeah, that would be great. Send it over, and I'll take a look.

Agent: Hi Michael, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you expressed interest in our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Yeah, hi. I was just checking out options. 
Agent: Great! We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 16.99%. It offers excellent cashback rewards on everyday purchases. 
Michael: 16.99%? That seems a little high. I have a couple of other cards with lower rates. 
Agent: I understand your concern, Michael. However, our card offers 3% cashback on all purchases, and 5% on gas and groceries. That can really add up. 
Michael: Hmm, cashback is nice, but the interest rate is still a sticking point. 
Agent: We can also offer a balance transfer option from your other cards, potentially saving you money overall. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 16.99%. 
Michael: I'd have to do the math. What's the annual fee? 
Agent: There's a $99 annual fee, but it's waived for the first year. 
Michael: Okay. I'll think about it. 
Agent: Absolutely. I can send you a link with a detailed comparison of our card versus other options. Would that be helpful? 
Michael: Yeah, that would be good.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special Personal Loan… 
Patricia: (Interrupting, loudly) You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, we are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) 24.99?! Are you kidding me?! This is ridiculous! I want my number removed from your list! 
Agent: But ma'am, we can help with… 
Patricia: (Screaming) No, you can't! Just take me off your list! (Click)
